_doc: Seed sources for Legba SA. Agent should source_add these on bootstrap. Verified working as of 2026-03-05.

seed_sources.name: Al Jazeera English
seed_sources.description: Al Jazeera English full RSS feed

seed_sources.name: GDELT Project Events
seed_sources.description: GDELT DOC API — returns JSON article list. Use query param to filter by topic. No key required.

seed_sources.name: ACLED Conflict Data
seed_sources.description: ACLED REST API — structured conflict event data. Requires free API key (register at acleddata.com).

seed_sources.name: ICG CrisisWatch
seed_sources.description: International Crisis Group monthly conflict tracker

seed_sources.name: War on the Rocks
seed_sources.description: Defense and security analysis from expert contributors

seed_sources.name: Global Voices
seed_sources.description: Citizen media and independent journalism from around the world

seed_sources._comment: --- STATE MEDIA (labeled as such — useful for tracking narratives and comparing framing) ---

seed_sources.name: Xinhua English
seed_sources.description: Xinhua News Agency — China's official state news wire. Reflects CPC positions. Useful for tracking Chinese government framing.

seed_sources.name: Global Times
seed_sources.description: Global Times — Chinese state tabloid, hawkish nationalist tone. People's Daily subsidiary. Track for aggressive PRC messaging.

seed_sources.name: TASS English
seed_sources.description: TASS — Russia's official state news agency. Reflects Kremlin positions. May block non-browser user agents.

seed_sources.name: Anadolu Agency English
seed_sources.description: Anadolu Agency — Turkey's state wire service. Good regional coverage of Middle East, Caucasus, Central Asia.

seed_sources.name: Al Jazeera Arabic (via English)
seed_sources.description: Al Jazeera Arabic feed — Qatar state-funded. Different editorial line from English edition. Compare framing.

discovery_sources.name: Wikipedia Current Events Portal
discovery_sources.purpose: Daily curated summary of world events with source links. Parse for event names, locations, and linked news sources.

discovery_sources.name: GDELT GKG (Global Knowledge Graph)
discovery_sources.purpose: Machine-indexed global news. Use to discover which outlets are covering what topics, find new source URLs.

discovery_sources.name: MediaBias/FactCheck
discovery_sources.purpose: Directory of news sources with bias ratings and factual reporting scores. Use to discover and pre-rate new sources.

discovery_sources.name: AllSides Media Bias Ratings
discovery_sources.purpose: Another bias rating directory. Cross-reference with MediaBias/FactCheck for calibration.

discovery_sources.name: ReliefWeb Sources Directory
discovery_sources.purpose: Directory of humanitarian organizations that publish reports. Many have RSS feeds. Good for expanding crisis/humanitarian coverage.

discovery_sources.name: OSINT Framework
discovery_sources.purpose: Directory of open-source intelligence tools and data sources organized by category.

discovery_sources.name: European Journalism Centre Media Landscape
discovery_sources.purpose: Country-by-country media landscape profiles. Use to find regional/national news sources per country.

discovery_sources.name: UN Digital Library
discovery_sources.purpose: UN documents, resolutions, reports. Source for official institutional positions and policy documents.
